rulings.Case Title: AHMED ABDULJABBAR VS. AARON THOMPKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
rulings.Rulings: Set for Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar on Tuesday, May 06, 2025, Line 1. 2 - DEFENDANT NIKE, INC., AN OREGON CORPORATION, NIKE USA, INC.,AN OREGON CORPORATION, and NIKE RETAIL SERVICES, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. Defendants and Cross-complainants Nike Inc., Nike USA Inc., and Nike Retail Services Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Colette N. Bradshears Pro Hac Vice is Granted. Good cause appearing, Counsel Colette N. Bradshears may appear as counsel pro hac vice for moving parties in this action. For the 9:00 a.m. calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely or in person. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom. (Dept. 302 Zoom ID 160 409 7690; Passcode 516287.) To appear remotely at the hearing, go to the court's website at sfsuperiorcourt.org under "Online Services," navigate to "Tentative Rulings," and click on the appropriate link, or dial the corresponding phone number. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. The subject line of the email shall include the line number, case name and case number. The text of the email shall include the name and contact information, including email address, of the attorney or party who will appear at the hearing. Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing even if the tentative ruling is not contested. The court no longer provides a court reporter in the Law & Motion Department. Parties may retain their own reporter, who may appear in the courtroom or remotely. A retained reporter must be a California certified court reporter (CSR), for only a CSR's transcript may be used in California courts. If a CSR is being retained, include in your email all of the following: their name, CSR and telephone numbers, and their individual work email address. =(302/JMQ)

rulings.Case Title: YALING CHEN VS. RICHARD HUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Rescheduling On Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Set for Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar on Tuesday, May 06, 2025, Line 6. 1 - DEFENDANT ANN HUM, EDMUND HUM,and BELINDA HUM Notice Of Rescheduling On Motion To Strike. Off calendar. This is not a properly noticed motion. On April 21, 2025, the court ordered these motions off calendar for failure to meet and confer, untimeliness under CCP Section 1005, and failure to meet and confer. The proper motion procedure would be to refile the motion, not notice a "Notice of Rescheduling On Motion to" for this date. For the 9:00 a.m. calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely or in person. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom. rulings.Case Title: KARGAROO LOGISTICS, LLC, ET AL VS. CARLOS BONILLA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Release Undertaking By Kargaroo Logistics Llc And Lance Jensen
rulings.Rulings: Set for Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar on Tuesday, May 06, 2025, Line 7. APPELLANTs KARGAROO LOGISTICS, LLC.'s,and LANCE JENSEN's Motion To Release Undertaking By Kargaroo Logistics Llc And Lance Jensen. Defendants/Appellants Kargaroo Logistics, LLC and Lance Jensen's unopposed Motion To Release Undertaking is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the court orders released the cash bond of Seventy-Three Thousand Three Hundred Twenty-One Dollars and Sixty-Eight Cents ($73,321.68) posted by Defendants/Appellants in this matter, with accrued interest per statute. The court orders the full amount of funds disbursed by check to Multi Air Freight, Inc.; c/o/ Lance Jensen; 99-D South Hill Drive; Brisbane, CA 94005. For the 9:00 a.m. calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely or in person. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom.
